prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e45ef808`.
codex_response:
Rule implemented: recolor only original `1`s in two columns, with `4` at the column of the rightmost `6` in the topmost row containing any `6`, and `9` at the column of the rightmost `1` in the bottommost row containing any `1`.

`arc2_opus46_summary.json` matched and was used; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because it only described vague boundary markers and missed the exact row/column selectors. The generator builds the same 12×12 family with a top `0` row, upper `1` region, lower `6` region, and descending transition bands via two constructive modes plus left-right mirroring. No new primitive was needed.
